title: AWP & Desert Eagle Overlay
description: Changes the bow and crossbow model to 3D guns for 1.8 & 1.20/1.21
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## Showcase ## Information texture pack that replaces the bow and crossbow textures with a 3d awp sniper rifle and desert eagle pistol model. also replaces arrows with bullets and changes bow, crossbow, and arrow sounds to gun sounds. no naming items required! works on most multiplayer servers and single player. available for 1.8, 1.20 and 1.21. the only versions with scopes for the awp are the _1.20/1.21: changes bow to desert eagle_ versions. ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this pack in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this pack or assets from this pack in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this pack or assets from this pack. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
